name: Brooklyn Premier Orthopedics FULL LEAK!
message: Brooklyn Premier Orthopedics is a full-service Orthopedic and Pain Management Center in the Ditmas Park area of Brooklyn. Patients outside of the Kings County, New York area may choose to visit one our other locations.  We have multiple Orthopedic offices in the NY and NJ Metro and area that can meet all of your orthopedic needs, from conservative management to complex surgeries.
